ab: Kaviaz daingaz inaak tupa’un tu Tanpilic, Uva’az amin a cias Bunun.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Tanpilic，他也是布農族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Tanpilic, and he is also an Bunun child.

ch: 我們一起在曲冰部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Ququaz tribe.

ab: Malucbut azam muskun tan’as madadaingaz bazbaz is qaiqabasan tu qalinga, mu’amin azam maqanciap malasbunun.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說布農語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Bunun proficiently.

ab: Malaungkav azak a masmuq amin, maputis at Tanpilic a makuis amin.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Tanpilic很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Tanpilic is short and thin.

ab: Mina’ia’ang sala kat Tanpilic ca mankama’az, asaun salas duma’ a miniqumic.
ch: Tanpilic很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Tanpilic is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
